name: Kharkiv Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the sky and the historic colour of the Sloboda Ukraine regiments
wheat, the steppe, and the historic crossed cornucopia and caduceus of the Kharkiv arms

description: A blue field charged in the centre with the coat of arms of Kharkiv Oblast — a green wreathed shield with the historic Kharkiv emblem of a crossed cornucopia and caduceus.
history: Adopted by the VI session of the XXIII convocation of the Kharkiv Oblast Council on 11 May 1999. Kharkiv historically was the capital of the Sloboda Ukraine cossack lands.

features.role: arms of Kharkiv Oblast — cornucopia and caduceus
features.symbolism: trade, agriculture and prosperity in the Sloboda Ukraine
